name: mcdev-mcp
description: MCP server for Minecraft mod development - decompiled code access, symbol search, and runtime interaction via DebugBridge
long_description: An MCP server for AI-assisted Minecraft mod development. Static tools provide access to decompiled Minecraft source code: browse classes and methods, search symbols, explore package hierarchies, find subclasses/implementors, and trace callers/callees across multiple Minecraft versions. Runtime tools interact with a running Minecraft instance through the DebugBridge mod: execute Lua inside the JVM, capture game state snapshots and screenshots, run slash commands, and inject runtime method loggers.

enable_script_logging.title: Log script executions
enable_script_logging.description: Append every mc_execute call (timestamp, code, result, error, duration) to ~/Library/Application Support/mcdev-mcp/script-logs/ (or the platform equivalent). Also enables the mc_script_logs tool for reviewing logs from inside Claude.

tools.name: mc_version
tools.description: Set or list the active Minecraft version for static analysis tools

tools.name: mc_search
tools.description: Search decompiled source for classes, methods, and fields by name

tools.name: mc_get_class
tools.description: Get the decompiled source code of a class

tools.name: mc_get_method
tools.description: Get the decompiled source of a specific method

tools.name: mc_list_classes
tools.description: List all classes in a package path

tools.name: mc_list_packages
tools.description: List all packages in the Minecraft source

tools.name: mc_find_hierarchy
tools.description: Find subclasses or interface implementors of a class

tools.name: mc_find_refs
tools.description: Find callers or callees of a method via the callgraph

tools.name: mc_connect
tools.description: Connect to a running Minecraft instance via the DebugBridge mod

tools.name: mc_execute
tools.description: Execute Lua code inside the running Minecraft JVM

tools.name: mc_snapshot
tools.description: Get a structured snapshot of current game state

tools.name: mc_screenshot
tools.description: Capture the Minecraft client framebuffer as a JPEG file

tools.name: mc_logger
tools.description: Inject, cancel, or list runtime method loggers
